name: io.github.NicoHern/abapilot-mcp
title: ABAPilot
description: MCP server for SAP ECC and on-premise S/4HANA: natural-language queries and ABAP dev tooling.

environmentVariables.name: ABAPILOT_URL
environmentVariables.description: URL of the ABAPilot SICF endpoint in your SAP system, e.g. https://sap-host:8443/sap/bc/abapilot

environmentVariables.name: ABAPILOT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token, alternative to basic authentication

environmentVariables.name: ABAPILOT_TLS_INSECURE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to skip TLS certificate verification (development systems only)
